title: Towards Simulation-to-Reality Transfer in EIT Tactile Sensing
description: Noise-augmented deep learning for sim-to-real transfer in EIT tactile sensing. Uses simulated data and domain randomisation to improve robustness, reduce data needs, and enable accurate real-world tactile reconstruction for robotic perception.

title: MatchMind
description: Machine learning-driven football analysis suite for player and team performance evaluation, tactical benchmarking, competitor scouting, and advanced xG modelling using StatBoost.

title: AlphaScreen
description: AlphaScreen is a state-of-the-art equity research tool embeded with your own specialised AI equity research assistant. Rank, backtest and evaluate stocks across global markets.
